title: P.I.L.L.E.R - Creature “TALL”
body:
Observation: The creature rarely seems to feel concern over its imprisonment, and only appears to remember when it transitions between environment “types”. Transitional phases (Example: going through doorways) seems to trigger a moment of remembrance and distress before subsiding after a few minutes.

Experiment: We have placed a void mirror in the creatures containment site to see if any reaction may be observed. Void mirror entities often take on the temperament and behavior of those they reflect.

Officer P-40L
